spec_match.rationale: The CSS selectors correctly map standard values (all, none, start, end, start end) to the text-decoration-skip-spaces property.

interactive.rationale: Features reactive button toggles that instantly modify the data attribute on the stage container, updating the underline decoration style in real time, with a visible code panel showing the exact selector mapping.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches parent description perfectly, letting authors toggle each option on linked text and inspect space skips.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes a CSS.supports('text-decoration-skip-spaces', 'all') banner so unsupported browsers clearly report that the CSS updates may not have visual effect.

references.rationale: Provides direct links to both the parent feature index and the target ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Excellent conformance to colors, borders, fonts, and crumb layout conventions.

openQuestions.title: Verify skip-spaces toggle in Chrome 150
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to open the page in Chrome 150 or Canary, toggle all five values, confirm the support banner matches CSS.supports(), and confirm the visible code panel remains readable on mobile width.

summary: Added the missing code panel and support banner; browser verification is still pending because chrome-devtools-mcp is unavailable in this session.
